compiled_state.title: Add review event emission to brainstorm fidelity review
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add emit-protocol-review-result.sh call to plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md after the fidelity review completes. Pass --review-type=brainstorm-fidelity, --pass-fail, --revision-cycles.

The brainstorm fidelity review dispatches its own sub-agents (not via REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md), so it needs its own emit call site.

## TDD Requirement
Exemption criterion 3: prose workflow doc, no conditional logic.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Emit call present in scrutiny pipeline
  Verify: grep -q "emit-protocol-review-result" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Added emit-protocol-review-result.sh call after Step 4 fidelity review in epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md. Passes --review-type=brainstorm-fidelity, --pass-fail, --revision-cycles. Grep verification passed.
comments.author: Main
